title: Welcome to your Moodboard
subtitle: Collect inspiration, colors, and references for your wedding in one place.

steps.title: Pick a tool from the toolbar
steps.body: Use the toolbar at the top to switch between Select, Pan, Image, Shape, and Text tools. The Select tool lets you move and resize items; the Pan tool lets you drag the whole board.
steps.tip: Press Space to temporarily switch to the Pan tool while you work.

steps.title: Add images and references
steps.body: Click the Image tool to upload from your device, or paste an image directly onto the board with Ctrl/Cmd+V. Drop files anywhere on the canvas to add them quickly.
steps.tip: You can also paste a URL — the moodboard will fetch a preview for you.

steps.title: Build your color palette
steps.body: Click on any image to sample its colors, or open the palette panel to add custom hex values. Drag swatches onto the board to create color blocks alongside your photos.
steps.tip: Try a starter template (Rustic, Modern, Classic) for instant inspiration.

steps.title: Organize and share
steps.body: Group related items together, label sections with the Text tool, and use multiple boards to compare directions. Everything saves automatically as you work.
steps.tip: Use Undo (Ctrl/Cmd+Z) and Redo (Ctrl/Cmd+Y) freely — your changes are reversible.
